questionHtml:
The student uses this model to predict the population of Canada in the year 2030, where t=30, and calculates a population of approximately 41.3 million people.

Interpret, in context, the value of a.
markschemeHtml:
a represents the (average) rate of increase (change) in population (0.358 millions of people per year).  (or equivalent)          R1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Interpret, in context, the value of a.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.4—Pearsons, scatter diagrams, eqn of y on x
